Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

Account Status

All merchant accounts must be LIVE before applying for LinePay activation.

Restricted Industries

  • Alcoholic beverages

  • Medical equipment restricted to selling only to hospitals, laboratories or medical professionals only

  • Animals and living things

  • Prohibited services such as debt service, pledge, mortgage, leasing

  • Gestational surrogacy service

  • Secondhand product

  • Human trafficking

  • Selling real money

  • Human remains and body parts

  • The stolen property

  • Cigarettes, electric cigarettes, cigars

  • Drugs and certain psychotropic and neurological substances

  • Digital currency or any related digital currency business personal investment such as forex and real estate

  • Goods relating to national security

  • Gambling products and services

  • Adult and obscene products

  • Financial and securities businesses

  • Foreign exchange business

  • Selling goods to support political parties

  • Weapons

  • Prohibited products under the Consumer Protection Act.Prof. 1979

SLA

Entity Origin

SLA

All Entities

7 to 14 business days

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Merchants submit requests via CS (help@xendit.th), MO (merchantops.th), or Sales/AM/BD team request for their merchant in #mo-request and #thailand-pg-activation-request

Merchant

2

Once activation request is received, MO consolidates merchant data into the designated sheet:XenditTH<>Line Pay MID Registration_13May2025

MO

3

Once completed, email the .XLSX submission to the LinePay team:

  • nattanit.a@linecorp.com

  • linepay_commercialteam@lmwn.com

4

Monitor finops email for the receipt of the merchant's unique MID.

5

Once MID is obtained, log in to the LinePay website to activate the MID.
Refer to this Video Tutorial for guidance.

Note: The video tutorial features a merchant whose application has already been fully approved by LINE Pay.

In some cases, even after we reset the password, the application status may still show as "Pending." If this happens, we need to wait an additional 1–3 business days for LINE Pay to complete their final approval. Once the status changes from Pending to Approved, we can then proceed to activate the MID

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Once the MID is activated on the partner portal, proceed with internal activation using retool.

MO

2

Navigate to the Channel Activation Tab, input the merchant’s BID, and select Transaction Entity (Xendit Thailand).

3

Select EWALLET as the payment method and LINEPAY One Time Payment as the Channel.

4

On the next page, Input credentials you can obtain from Linepay Portal - AG_Xendit & AG_Xenditdigital:

  • Merchant name = Merchant name

  • Linepay merchant ID = MerchantID

  • Linepay private key = secret key

5

Click "Activate" to complete the process.

Can also refer to this video tutorial for guidance.

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

If a merchant fails onboarding criteria, the MO agent notifies the requester via the original submission channel:

  • CS: Inform the team to relay the result to the merchant.

  • Direct MO: Respond to the existing email thread.

  • Sales/Slack: Reply within the #mo-request or #thailand-pg-activation-request thread.

MO
